finding.summary: The track is 92% silence, making integrated loudness (-20 LUFS) and RMS (-55 dBFS) unreliable indicators of vocal level. Active content true peak is -5.5 dBTP, but the track spends most of its time silent.
finding.probable_cause: Source audio contains long pauses or was edited to silence between phrases; no gating plugin is present in the empty FX chain.
finding.confidence_reason: silence_fraction is a direct objective measurement from the isolated capture.

evidence_refs.description: 92% dead air dilutes all level statistics
-20 LUFS integrated, but biased by silence
1/3-octave bands show low levels due to averaging over silence

proposal.reason: No FX, routing, or track parameter adjustments can address a 92% silence fraction. This requires waveform editing outside the allowed operations (set volume/pan/FX).
